name: Travel Agency & Tours
description: Hotels, tour operators, DMCs, cruise specialists. Pre-loaded with travel-specific hooks, hashtags, and playbooks.

name: Real Estate & Property
description: Agents, brokerages, luxury properties, vacation rentals. Walkthrough reels and market education content.

name: Restaurants & Food
description: Restaurants, cafes, bars, food trucks, caterers. Chef POV reels, dish cinematography, behind-the-scenes.

name: Fitness & Coaching
description: Gyms, personal trainers, nutritionists, life coaches. Transformation stories, workout breakdowns.

name: Dental & Medical Clinics
description: Dentists, dermatologists, med spas, optometrists. Patient education and practice humanization.

name: Custom / Build Your Own
description: Any business not covered by the pre-built packs. Answer 10 questions and we auto-generate your pack.
exampleBusinesses: Any business type — we adapt to you.
